_readme: Elite Claude Swarm — MCP Server Configuration. Copy needed servers to ~/.claude.json mcpServers section. Replace all YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with real values.

github.description: GitHub operations — PRs, issues, repos, code search, file contents
github.setup: Create PAT at https://github.com/settings/tokens with: repo, read:org, read:user

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph — cross-session memory for agents
memory.setup: No config needed. Stores a knowledge graph that persists across Claude sessions.

sequential-thinking.description: Multi-step chain-of-thought reasoning — enables complex problem decomposition

context7.description: Live documentation lookup — fetches up-to-date library docs. Replaces hallucinated docs.
context7.setup: No API key needed. Uses free tier. Optional: set CONTEXT7_API_KEY for higher limits.
context7.usage: When implementing with any library, use context7 to get current API docs before coding.

filesystem.description: Extended filesystem operations beyond standard Claude file tools
filesystem.setup: Change the path argument to your projects directory. Add multiple paths as needed.

exa-web-search.description: Web search + research for research-first development workflow. Better than Google for technical content.
exa-web-search.setup: Get API key at https://dashboard.exa.ai. Free tier: 1000 searches/month.

supabase.description: Supabase DB + auth operations — query tables, manage schema, RLS policies
supabase.setup: Get project ref from Supabase dashboard URL. Access token from Account → Access Tokens.

postgres.description: Direct PostgreSQL operations — run queries, inspect schema, optimize
postgres.setup: Set connection string. Use read-only user for safety in production.

redis.setup: Update URL to your Redis instance. Supports auth: redis://:password@host:port

docker.description: Docker container management — list, inspect, start/stop containers
docker.setup: Requires Docker Desktop running. No additional config needed.

langfuse.description: LLM observability — traces, evals, prompt management, token costs
langfuse.setup: Get keys at https://cloud.langfuse.com. Self-host option available.

qdrant.description: Qdrant vector DB — manage collections, inspect vectors, run similarity searches
qdrant.setup: Point to your Qdrant instance. API key optional for local instances.

vercel.description: Vercel deployments + project management — deploy, inspect, manage env vars
vercel.setup: Authenticate via: claude mcp add vercel https://mcp.vercel.com

cloudflare-workers-bindings.description: Cloudflare Workers bindings — KV, R2, D1, Durable Objects

cloudflare-observability.description: Cloudflare observability — logs, analytics, error tracking

railway.description: Railway deployments — services, env vars, volumes, networking

_installation.copy_to_global: Copy mcpServers section to ~/.claude.json for global availability

_quick_setup_tier_a.description: Commands to add all Tier A servers at once
commands: claude mcp add github -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=YOUR_PAT npx -- -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github
claude mcp add exa-web-search -e EXA_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY npx -- -y exa-mcp-server
